topics.title: Phase 5 Progress Update
key_points: UI panel added for Streamlit app
priority on improving grounding and output quality
supporting_evidence: The structured outputs foundation has been implemented with task schemas, a registry, JSON parsing, and validation.
A first UI panel was added to the Streamlit app so users can run extraction, summary, checklist, and CV analysis.

payload.executive_summary: Phase 5 of the project has seen the implementation of a structured outputs foundation with task schemas and a UI panel for the Streamlit app. However, prompt quality remains uneven, necessitating improvements in grounding and output quality.
key_insights: current focus on enhancing foundational aspects
